name: Scentre Group
analysis: SCG's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$3.8100, stop A$3.6036, target A$4.4292 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
